title: Science of farming System
description: The main objectives of Science of Farming System  are the continuous increase in crop production, economic efficiency and ecological security. It also systematically introduces the basic theory and technical of farmland cropping system, farmland fertility maintenance system, farmland protection system, farming management system and regional farming system. And it can help the researchers to study the establishment of rational cultivation system and  master the basic principles and technical system. The main objectives of this lesson attach importance to the exploitation of arable soil production potential and the improvement of production system efficiency. At the same time, Science of Farming System emphasizes cost savings while efficiency gains and green sustainable development.

instructors.name: Tie CAI;Xiaoli CHEN;Rui WANG;Peng ZHANG;Xiaolong REN
